---
title: "Cluster SpatialData"
jupyter: xenium
params:
  sample: "default"
  path: "."
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
---

```{python}
#| tags: [parameters]
#| include: false

sample = "default"
path = "."
```

```{python}
#| include: false

import scanpy as sc
import squidpy as sq
import spatialdata
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

from timer import timer, write_timings_tsv

with timer("Read zarr"):
    sdata = spatialdata.read_zarr(path)

# xenium() names the table "table"; concatenated objects may rename it.
# Fall back to the first available table if "table" is absent.
table_key = "table" if "table" in sdata.tables else next(iter(sdata.tables))
with timer("Extract table"):
    adata = sdata.tables[table_key].copy()

print(f"Sample:  {sample}")
print(f"Table:   {adata.n_obs:,} cells × {adata.n_vars:,} genes  (key: '{table_key}')")
```

```{python}
#| include: false

with timer("QC"):
    sc.pp.calculate_qc_metrics(adata, percent_top=(10, 20, 50, 150), inplace=True)
    n_before = adata.n_obs
    sc.pp.filter_cells(adata, min_counts=10)
    sc.pp.filter_genes(adata, min_cells=5)

print(f"Filtered {n_before - adata.n_obs:,} low-quality cells.")
print(f"Retained {adata.n_obs:,} cells × {adata.n_vars:,} genes.")
```

```{python}
#| include: false

with timer("Normalize"):
    adata.layers["counts"] = adata.X.copy()
    sc.pp.normalize_total(adata, inplace=True)
    sc.pp.log1p(adata)
```

```{python}
#| include: false

with timer("PCA"):
    sc.pp.pca(adata)

with timer("Neighbors"):
    sc.pp.neighbors(adata)

with timer("UMAP"):
    sc.tl.umap(adata)

with timer("Leiden"):
    sc.tl.leiden(adata)

print(f"Leiden clustering: {adata.obs['leiden'].nunique()} clusters")
```

```{python}
#| include: false

with timer("Spatial neighbors"):
    sq.gr.spatial_neighbors(adata, coord_type="generic", delaunay=True)

with timer("Nhood enrichment"):
    sq.gr.nhood_enrichment(adata, cluster_key="leiden")
```

## UMAP — Leiden clusters

Cell embeddings colored by Leiden cluster assignment for `{python} sample`.

```{python}
sc.pl.umap(
    adata,
    color="leiden",
    legend_loc="on data",
    title=f"{sample} — UMAP by Leiden cluster",
)
plt.show()
```

## UMAP — total counts

Cell embeddings colored by total transcript counts for `{python} sample`, before normalization.

```{python}
sc.pl.umap(
    adata,
    color="total_counts",
    title=f"{sample} — UMAP by total counts",
)
plt.show()
```

## Spatial — Leiden clusters

Leiden cluster assignments plotted at cell centroid coordinates for `{python} sample`.

```{python}
# sq.pl.spatial_scatter requires adata.uns['spatial'] (Visium-style), which
# SpatialData Xenium tables don't populate. sc.pl.embedding reads obsm directly.
sc.pl.embedding(
    adata,
    basis="spatial",
    color="leiden",
    title=f"{sample} — Leiden clusters (spatial)",
)
plt.show()
```

## Neighbourhood enrichment

Enrichment z-scores between Leiden cluster pairs for `{python} sample`, computed from a permutation test on the spatial neighbour graph.

```{python}
sq.pl.nhood_enrichment(
    adata,
    cluster_key="leiden",
    title=f"{sample} — Neighbourhood enrichment",
)
plt.show()
```

```{python}
#| include: false

write_timings_tsv("cluster_sdata.timing.tsv")
```
